---
title: "Haotian Tang"
author: "Biostatistics · Computational Genomics · Precision Medicine"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: false
    css: styles.css
---

```{=html}
<div class="site-shell">
  <section class="hero-section">
    <div class="hero-grid">
      <aside class="profile-card">
        <div class="profile-photo-wrap">
          <img src="./img/portrait.jpg"
               alt="Portrait of Haotian Tang"
               class="profile-photo">
        </div>
        <h1>Haotian Tang</h1>
        <p class="subtitle">PhD Student, MBZUAI</p>
        <p class="mini-bio">
          Biostatistician and computational genomics researcher working at the interface of pharmacogenomics,
          adverse drug reaction prediction, and AI-driven biomedical discovery.
        </p>
        <div class="contact-stack">
          <a href="mailto:syncotang@gmail.com">syncotang@gmail.com</a>
          <a href="https://orcid.org/0009-0000-2410-9092" target="_blank" rel="noopener">ORCID</a>
          <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/syncotang/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">LinkedIn</a>
          <a href="Resume.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Resume</a>
        </div>
      </aside>

      <main class="hero-content">
        <p class="eyebrow">Single-cell omics · Pharmacogenomics · Multi-omics integration</p>
        <h2>Building interpretable AI systems for genomics and precision medicine.</h2>
        <p class="lead-text">
          I completed my M.S. in Biostatistics at Columbia University, specializing in statistical genetics.
          I am a PhD student at Mohamed bin Zayed University of Artificial Intelligence (MBZUAI),
          supervised by Dr. Jun Wen and Dr. Eduardo Beltrame. My current work focuses on modeling structured
          biomedical relationships among drugs, genes, adverse drug reactions, diseases, and genetic variants.
        </p>
        <div class="button-row">
          <a class="button-primary" href="#publications">View publications</a>
          <a class="button-secondary" href="#research">Research focus</a>
        </div>
      </main>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section id="research" class="content-section">
    <div class="section-heading">
      <p class="eyebrow">Research</p>
      <h2>Current focus</h2>
    </div>
    <div class="card-grid three-columns">
      <div class="info-card highlight-card">
        <h3>HyperADRs</h3>
        <p>
          Hierarchical hypergraph modeling for drug-gene-ADR prediction, with emphasis on biologically grounded
          hyperedges, ADR categorization, and interpretable query-conditioned prediction.
        </p>
      </div>
      <div class="info-card">
        <h3>Variant-level modeling</h3>
        <p>
          Tensor-based representation of variant-indexed directional co-occurrence structures to quantify genetic
          effects on drug-disease-ADR relationships.
        </p>
      </div>
      <div class="info-card">
        <h3>Single-cell and multi-omics</h3>
        <p>
          Integration of single-cell, population-level, and clinical data to study biological heterogeneity and
          precision-medicine mechanisms.
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="content-section">
    <div class="section-heading">
      <p class="eyebrow">Education</p>
      <h2>Academic training</h2>
    </div>
    <div class="timeline">
      <div class="timeline-item">
        <span class="timeline-date">2026–</span>
        <div>
          <h3>Mohamed bin Zayed University of Artificial Intelligence</h3>
          <p>PhD student. Supervisors: Dr. Jun Wen and Dr. Eduardo Beltrame.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="timeline-item">
        <span class="timeline-date">2023–2025</span>
        <div>
          <h3>Columbia University</h3>
          <p>M.S. in Biostatistics, Statistical Genetics track.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="timeline-item">
        <span class="timeline-date">2018–2022</span>
        <div>
          <h3>University of Toronto</h3>
          <p>Honours B.S.; Specialist in Pharmacology, Major in Genome Biology, Minor in Mathematics.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section id="publications" class="content-section">
    <div class="section-heading">
      <p class="eyebrow">Selected publications</p>
      <h2>Recent work</h2>
    </div>
    <div class="publication-list">
      <article class="publication-card featured-publication">
        <div class="pub-label">Preprint · equal contribution</div>
        <h3>HyperADRs: A hierarchical hypergraph framework for drug-gene-ADR prediction</h3>
        <p>
          Cai, Z.*, <strong>Tang, H.*</strong>, Gao, S., Zhou, B., Zhao, J., &amp; Wen, J.
          <em>arXiv</em>, 2512.00137, 2025.
        </p>
        <a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.00137" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Read on arXiv</a>
      </article>

      <article class="publication-card">
        <h3>Improvement in vision-related quality-of-life using the NEI-VFQ-9 over 1 year</h3>
        <p>
          Hark, L.A., Gorroochurn, P., <strong>Tang, H.</strong>, <em>et al.</em>
          <em>Graefe's Archive for Clinical and Experimental Ophthalmology</em>, 263, 2069–2079, 2025.
        </p>
        <a href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s00417-024-06727-z" target="_blank" rel="noopener">DOI</a>
      </article>

      <article class="publication-card">
        <h3>Association of behavioral factors with activation in patients with AMD or DR</h3>
        <p>
          Morse, A.R., Hark, L.A., Seiple, W.H., Gorroochurn, P., <strong>Tang, H.</strong>, <em>et al.</em>
          <em>Clinical Ophthalmology</em>, 19, 3059–3069, 2025.
        </p>
        <a href="https://doi.org/10.2147/OPTH.S542352" target="_blank" rel="noopener">DOI</a>
      </article>

      <article class="publication-card">
        <h3>Modifying locus of control beliefs may improve activation in AMD or DR</h3>
        <p>
          Morse, A.R., Hark, L.A., Seiple, W., Gorroochurn, P., <strong>Tang, H.</strong>, <em>et al.</em>
          <em>Investigative Ophthalmology &amp; Visual Science</em>, 66(8), 699, 2025.
        </p>
        <a href="https://iovs.arvojournals.org/article.aspx?articleid=2805311" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Abstract</a>
      </article>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="content-section compact-section">
    <div class="section-heading">
      <p class="eyebrow">Methods and tools</p>
      <h2>Technical interests</h2>
    </div>
    <div class="tag-cloud">
      <span>R</span><span>Python</span><span>Statistical genetics</span><span>Pharmacogenomics</span>
      <span>Hypergraph neural networks</span><span>Tensor decomposition</span><span>Single-cell omics</span>
      <span>Multi-omics integration</span><span>Precision medicine</span><span>Biomedical AI</span>
    </div>
  </section>
</div>
```
